01-basic-group.title: Basic Group
01-basic-group.description: A simple group container that arranges multiple elements together. Use this to organize related UI elements in a consistent layout.

02-create-project.title: Create Project
02-create-project.description: A primary grouped action for creating a named item.

03-filter-bar.title: Filter Bar with Selects
03-filter-bar.description: Horizontal group combining Select dropdowns with action buttons for filtering interfaces.

04-documentation-search.title: Documentation Search
04-documentation-search.description: A search input with an icon prefix and joined submit button.

05-email-signup.title: Email Signup
05-email-signup.description: An email input with a joined subscription action.

06-copy-command.title: Copy Command
06-copy-command.description: A read-only command field with a joined copy action.

07-delete-confirmation.title: Delete Confirmation
07-delete-confirmation.description: A danger variant group for destructive confirmation flows.

08-slider-integration.title: Slider with Input Group
08-slider-integration.description: Numeric input synced with a slider for precise value selection.
